pr.title: Bump dtk to 1.6.2 to fix hsd_3AA7 relocs
pr.author: r-burns

summary: Updated decomp-toolkit from 1.5.1 to 1.6.2 in both the Nix package definition and configure.py, allowing removal of a large manual add_relocations workaround from config/GALE01/config.yml. The PR title identifies the motivating bug as fixing hsd_3AA7 relocations. Evidence suggests dtk 1.6.2 gained or corrected relocation handling that made the explicit rel24 and sda21 relocation list unnecessary.
what_changed: Updated the Nix fetchFromGitHub hash for encounter/decomp-toolkit v1.6.2 from sha256-jLOYZ6afvdaZYUflzVoE/4609je/1HBT/qdHVVHxatI= to sha256-5ujrgDvXs0dH0mub+l5MUuuiIU1OAYu6KgD8f50tcNw=.
Changed configure.py config.dtk_tag from v1.5.1 to v1.6.2.
Removed the add_relocations block from config/GALE01/config.yml, deleting 576 lines of manually specified relocations.

The removed relocations included many .text rel24 entries to functions such as memset, memcpy, OSDisableInterrupts, OSRestoreInterrupts, CARDFastOpen, CARDReadAsync, CARDWriteAsync, CARDCreateAsync, CARDGetStatus, CARDSetStatusAsync, CARDGetXferredBytes, and CARDClose.

The removed relocations also included many sda21 entries targeting HSD data symbols such as hsd_804D7980, hsd_804D7988, hsd_804D7990, hsd_804D7994, and hsd_804D799C, including several hsd_804D7988 addend: 4 cases.
smart_moves: Fixed the relocation issue at the toolchain level instead of preserving a large project-local manual relocation override list.
Kept decomp-toolkit version references synchronized between the Nix build definition and configure.py, reducing the risk of different environments using different dtk versions.
Removed configuration debt after the tool update, making config/GALE01/config.yml much smaller and less error-prone.
Used a pinned Nix hash for the new decomp-toolkit release, preserving reproducibility while updating the tool.
decomp_lessons: When a config.yml accumulates a very large add_relocations section, check whether the underlying decomp-toolkit version can infer or emit those relocations correctly before adding more manual entries.
Relocation fixes may belong in dtk rather than in per-version game config, especially when the workaround is broad and repetitive across rel24 and sda21 entries.
After upgrading core decomp tooling, remove obsolete manual relocation overrides so future matching work is not obscured by stale config.
For tool bumps, update every source of truth for tool versions, including build environment files such as .nix/decomp-toolkit.nix and project configuration scripts such as configure.py.
naming_conventions: Tool version tags in configure.py use a leading v form, e.g. config.dtk_tag = "v1.6.2".
The Nix package version omits the leading v and constructs rev = "v${version}".
Unidentified HSD symbols in the removed relocation list use address-derived names such as hsd_803B2FA0, hsd_803B2B20, hsd_804D7988, and hsd_804D799C.
External Dolphin/SDK symbols in relocation targets retain canonical names such as OSDisableInterrupts, CARDReadAsync, CARDWriteAsync, CARDFastOpen, and CARDGetXferredBytes.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Manual add_relocations entries can specify source section and address, relocation type such as rel24 or sda21, target symbol, and optionally addend.

The removed workaround shows the kinds of relocations that were previously needed around the hsd_3AA7 area: branch rel24 relocations to functions and small-data-area sda21 relocations to HSD data symbols.
Bumping dtk to 1.6.2 appears to make those manual relocation declarations unnecessary for the hsd_3AA7 region, though the exact dtk internal fix is not shown in the PR slice.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided slice.
The PR had one issue comment according to counts, but no human text excerpt was included, so no concrete review feedback can be extracted.
follow_up_queries: Find the decomp-toolkit v1.6.2 release notes or commits that mention hsd_3AA7 relocation handling.
Search for remaining add_relocations blocks in config/GALE01/config.yml or other config files that may be removable after newer dtk versions.
Check whether subsequent PRs adjusted hsd_3AA7 symbols or HSD relocation naming after this tool bump.
Verify CI/build logs for this PR if available to confirm the relocation fix was exercised by the configured build.
